# SparseNeuroVol { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVol }

```python
SparseNeuroVol(data, space, indices=None, label='', mask=None)
```

Sparse 3D neuroimaging volume.

Direct translation of R's SparseNeuroVol class.
Uses scipy.sparse for efficient storage.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name    | Type                                           | Description                       | Default    |
|---------|------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------|------------|
| data    | [array](`array`) - [like](`like`)              | Non-zero values                   | _required_ |
| space   | [NeuroSpace](`neuroim.neuro_space.NeuroSpace`) | Spatial metadata                  | _required_ |
| indices | [array](`array`) - [like](`like`)              | Linear indices of non-zero values | `None`     |
| label   | [str](`str`)                                   | Volume label                      | `''`       |

## R Equivalent {.doc-section .doc-section-r-equivalent}

neuroim2::SparseNeuroVol

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [data](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.data) | Get non-zero values. |
| [indices](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.indices) | Get indices of non-zero values. |
| [nnz](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.nnz) | Number of non-zero elements. |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [as_array](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.as_array) | Convert to numpy array. |
| [as_dense](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.as_dense) | Convert to dense representation. |
| [as_logical](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.as_logical) | Convert to logical representation. |
| [as_numeric](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.as_numeric) | Get non-zero values only. |
| [as_sparse](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.as_sparse) | Already sparse, optionally apply new mask. |
| [values](#neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.values) | Get all values (including zeros). |

### as_array { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.as_array }

```python
SparseNeuroVol.as_array()
```

Convert to numpy array.

### as_dense { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.as_dense }

```python
SparseNeuroVol.as_dense()
```

Convert to dense representation.

### as_logical { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.as_logical }

```python
SparseNeuroVol.as_logical()
```

Convert to logical representation.

### as_numeric { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.as_numeric }

```python
SparseNeuroVol.as_numeric()
```

Get non-zero values only.

#### R Equivalent {.doc-section .doc-section-r-equivalent}

neuroim2::as.numeric

### as_sparse { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.as_sparse }

```python
SparseNeuroVol.as_sparse(mask=None)
```

Already sparse, optionally apply new mask.

### values { #neuroim.SparseNeuroVol.values }

```python
SparseNeuroVol.values()
```

Get all values (including zeros).
